title: Payment
agree_terms: I agree to the terms and conditions
please_agree_terms: Please agree to the terms and conditions first
payment_instructions: Please complete your payment following the instructions below
va_instruction: Transfer to the following Virtual Account number before the deadline
qris_instruction: Scan the QRIS code using your e-wallet or mobile banking app
ewallet_instruction: You will be redirected to the e-wallet app to complete payment
no_transactions_description: Your transaction history will appear here after your first payment
escrow_description: Funds held by platform until milestone is approved
midtrans_payment_info: You will be redirected to the Midtrans payment page to choose a payment method (Bank Transfer, QRIS, E-Wallet, etc).
midtrans_key_missing: Payment gateway configuration is incomplete. Please contact administrator.
snap_not_loaded: Payment gateway is not ready. Please reload the page.
pending_payment_desc: Your payment is being processed. You will receive a notification once the payment is confirmed.
payment_success_desc: Escrow funds have been received. Your project will begin shortly.
